items.description: The brutal March that battered some of the world’s biggest hedge funds is already fading into the background as the firms reported their strongest first-half results in five years.

items.title: US Revokes Waiver Allowing Iran Oil Sales After Attacks
items.description: The US revoked a sanctions waiver that allowed Iran to sell oil globally, reversing course on a key element of an interim peace deal after a spate of attacks in the Strait of Hormuz.
